text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Nikkei Sho is here, and Narita Taishin returns
to Nakayama Racecourse once again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her heart is full of apprehension—she wants to
run like she did in the Satsuki Sho... But what if a
repeat of the Kikuka Sho occurs?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite this fear, she finds her feet again after
some reassuring words.
